steps.title: Find the relationship
steps.content: The first sentence says animals with more diverse behavior tend to have larger, more energy-demanding brains. The next claim follows from that idea: animals performing only basic actions should spend fewer resources on brain tissue.

steps.title: Choose a consequence signal
steps.content: A signals time sequence, B signals an additional point, and C signals contrast. The blank needs a transition meaning "therefore" because the second sentence is a consequence of the first. The answer is D.
